title: What happens when agents get their own computers
summary: Cursor Engineering Lead Jonas Nelle demonstrates two new autonomous agent capabilities: agents that write code, test it, and produce video proof of functionality, and a cloud agent that manages PR workflows through merge-ready state. The demo showcases how agents can remove human bottlenecks in the software development cycle with intentional checkpoints and a new agents-first view in Cursor 3.
